---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem
What problem are you trying to solve? Describe the user need or workflow that's currently painful or impossible.

## Proposed solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Include UI sketches, API shapes, or example usage if relevant.

## Alternatives considered
Other approaches you thought about, and why they fall short.

## Additional context
Links to related issues, screenshots from other tools that handle this well, or any other context.
